narrative:
Kettering 2-D (precinct in Montgomery County) has 1,134 registered voters, with 58.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.9%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.2 percentage points.
